name: TrueBuild Business Credit
description: TrueBuild Business Credit helps small businesses build corporate credit through a structured 7-step program. The program typically takes 90–120 days and has served over 48,000 businesses since 2001.
slogan: The Internet’s longest-standing business credit building program.
audience: Small business owners seeking to build corporate credit separate from personal credit

itemListElement.name: 7-Step Business Credit Building Program
itemListElement.description: A structured coaching program that takes small businesses through 7 steps to build corporate credit. Typical timeline: 90–120 days.

itemListElement.name: Free Business Credit Analysis
itemListElement.description: A complimentary review of your current business credit standing with a roadmap for improvement.

itemListElement.name: Corporate Credit Coaching
itemListElement.description: One-on-one guidance through the business credit building process.

itemListElement.name: Business Credit Monitoring
itemListElement.description: Ongoing monitoring of business credit health and profile.
